response.justification: Candidate has strong, well-rounded software engineering experience (15+ years) with relevant exposure to developer tooling, testing, CI/CD, and workshops/teaching. However, the resume shows no explicit people-management or formal team-leadership experience, which is a hard requirement (2+ years). Mobile-platform depth is also limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016, and there is no evidence of leading developer-productivity teams or organizational change at the scale this role implies.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience including testing, CI/CD, and dev tooling
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring through workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
Hands-on with build/test infrastructure, MCP code generators, and open-source tooling
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience shown
Mobile-platform experience is thin and dated (single 2015-2016 iOS/Apple TV stint)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap
